debug_info.goal:
case refine_3
G : Type u_1
inst✝¹ : Group G
K : ℝ
inst✝ : DecidableEq G
A : Finset G
hA₀ : A.Nonempty
hA : ↑(A ^ 2).card ≤ K * ↑A.card
hK : 1 ≤ K
S : Finset G := {g ∈ A⁻¹ * A | ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(MulOpposite.op g • A ∩ A).card}
hS₁ : 1 ∈ S
hS₀ : S.Nonempty
hSA : S ⊆ A⁻¹ * A
hSsymm : S⁻¹ = S
hScard : ↑S.card ≤ K ^ 2 * ↑A.card
F : Finset G
hFA : F ⊆ A
hFcard : ↑F.card ≤ 2 * K
hASF : A ⊆ S * F
⊢ ∃ a ∈ A, ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2).card

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨a, ha, hcard⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S * {a}) := by
      by_contra! h
      have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
        contrapose! hA₀
        rw [not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at hA₀ ⊢
        simpa [hA₀] using hASF
      have : (#A : ℝ) < #A := calc
        (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ a in F, #(A ∩ S * {a}) := by
          norm_cast
          calc #A ≤ #(F.biUnion fun a ↦ A ∩ S * {a}) := card_le_card_of_subset <| by
              simpa [subset_def, mem_mul] using hASF
            _ ≤ ∑ a in F, #(A ∩ S * {a}) := card_biUnion_le
        _ < ∑ a in F, #A / (2 * K) := sum_lt_sum (fun a ha ↦ h a ha) hF₀
        _ = #F * (#A / (2 * K)) := by simp
        _ ≤ (2 * K) * (#A / (2 * K)) := by gcongr
        _ = #A := by field_simp [show (0:ℝ) < K by positivity]
      linarith
    refine ⟨a, hFA ha, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S * {a}) := hcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 * {a}) := by gcongr; simpa using hS₁
      _ = #(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2) := by congr; ext; simp

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty :=
      let ⟨x, hx⟩ := hA₀
      let ⟨_, _, f, hf, _⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF hx)
      ⟨f, hf⟩
    obtain ⟨a, haF, ha⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      by_contra! h
      have : (#A : ℝ) < #A := calc
        (#A : ℝ) ≤ #(⋃ a ∈ F, A ∩ S <• a) := by
          push_cast
          exact card_le_card_of_subset fun x hx ↦ by
            obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF hx)
            rw [mem_biUnion]
            exact ⟨f, hf, mem_inter hx (mem_smul_finset hs)⟩
        _ ≤ ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
        _ < ∑ a ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) := Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty hF₀ h
        _ = #F * (#A / (2 * K)) := by simp
        _ ≤ 2 * K * (#A / (2 * K)) := by gcongr
        _ = #A := by field_simp [show 2 * K ≠ 0 by positivity]; ring
      exact this.ne rfl
    refine ⟨a, hFA haF, ha.trans ?_⟩
    gcongr
    exact pow_subset_pow_of_one_mem hS₁ one_le_two

obtain ⟨a, ha, ha_max⟩ := F.exists_max_image (fun f ↦ (A ∩ S <• f).card) <| by
      rw [nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; rintro rfl; simp at hASF; exact hA₀.ne_empty hASF
    refine ⟨a, hFA ha, ?_⟩
    have h_cov : A ⊆ ⋃ f ∈ F, S <• f := fun x hx ↦ by
      obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF hx)
      exact mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, mem_smul_finset.2 ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩⟩
    have : ↑A.card ≤ ↑F.card * ↑(A ∩ S <• a).card := calc
      ↑A.card ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, ↑(A ∩ S <• f).card := by
        rw [← inter_biUnion, inter_eq_left.2 h_cov]; exact mod_cast card_biUnion_le
      _ ≤ ∑ _ ∈ F, ↑(A ∩ S <• a).card := sum_le_sum fun i hi ↦ by gcongr; exact ha_max i hi
      _ = ↑F.card * ↑(A ∩ S <• a).card := by simp
    calc
      ↑A.card / (2 * K) ≤ ↑A.card / ↑F.card := by
        gcongr; exact div_nonneg (Nat.cast_nonneg _) (by positivity); exact hFcard
      _ ≤ ↑(A ∩ S <• a).card :=
        (div_le_iff₀ <| Nat.cast_pos.2 <| Finset.card_pos.2 ⟨a, ha⟩).2 (by rwa [mul_comm])
      _ ≤ ↑(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a).card := by
        gcongr; exact subset_inter (subset_refl _) (smul_finset_subset_smul_finset (subset_mul_right hS₁))

have hF : F.Nonempty := by
      rw [nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
      rintro rfl
      simp only [mul_empty, subset_empty] at hASF
      exact hA₀.ne_empty hASF
    obtain ⟨a, haF, ha⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / #F ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      by_contra! h
      apply lt_irrefl (#A : ℝ)
      calc
        #A ≤ ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
          mod_cast calc
            #A ≤ #(A ∩ S * F) := by rwa [inter_eq_left]
            _ = #(F.biUnion fun a ↦ A ∩ S <• a) := by rw [← mul_eq_biUnion, inter_biUnion]
            _ ≤ _ := card_biUnion_le
        _ < ∑ a ∈ F, (#A / #F : ℝ) := sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty hF fun x hx ↦ h x hx
        _ = #A := by field_simp [hF.card_pos.ne']
    refine ⟨a, hFA haF, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := ha
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) := by gcongr; simpa using hS₁

obtain ⟨a, ha, h⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      by_contra! h
      have hF : F.Nonempty := by
        by_contra hF
        simp [eq_empty_of_isEmpty (h := hF)] at hASF
        exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty_iff.1 hASF)
      refine lt_irrefl (#A : ℝ) <| calc
        (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
          norm_cast
          rw [← mul_eq_biUnion] at hASF
          conv_lhs => rw [← inter_eq_left.2 hASF, ← inter_biUnion]
          exact card_biUnion_le
        _ < ∑ a ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) := sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty hF h
        _ = #F * (#A / (2 * K)) := by simp
        _ ≤ (2 * K) * (#A / (2 * K)) := by gcongr
        _ = #A := by field_simp [show K ≠ 0 by linarith]
    refine ⟨a, hFA ha, ?_⟩
    calc
      _ ≤ (#(A ∩ S <• a) : ℝ) := h
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) := by gcongr; exact subset_mul_left _ hS₁

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
      rw [nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
      rintro rfl
      simp at hASF
      exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty_iff.1 hASF)
    have : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := calc
      _ ≤ #(⋃ f ∈ F, A ∩ S <• f) := by
        mod_cast apply card_le_card
        intro x hx
        obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := hASF hx
        exact mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, mem_inter.2 ⟨hx, ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩⟩⟩
      _ ≤ _ := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
    obtain ⟨a, haF, ha⟩ := exists_le_of_le_sum hF₀ this
    refine ⟨a, hFA haF, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ _ := ha
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) := by gcongr; exact subset_mul_left hS₁

obtain ⟨f, hfF, hf⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / #F ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
        by_contra h; rw [not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at h
        simp [h] at hASF; exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty_iff.1 hASF)
      refine exists_le_of_le_sum hF₀ ?_
      rw [div_mul_cancel₀ _ (mod_cast hF₀.card_ne_zero)]
      calc
        (#A : ℝ) ≤ #(S * F ∩ A) := mod_cast card_le_card_of_subset_left hASF
        _ = #(F.biUnion (fun i ↦ S <• i ∩ A)) := by
          congr; ext x; simp only [mem_inter, mem_mul, mem_biUnion, mem_smul_finset]
          constructor
          · rintro ⟨⟨s, hs, g, hg, rfl⟩, hA⟩; exact ⟨g, hg, ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩, hA⟩
          · rintro ⟨g, hg, ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩, hA⟩; exact ⟨⟨s, hs, g, hg, rfl⟩, hA⟩
        _ ≤ ∑ x ∈ F, #(S <• x ∩ A) := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
        _ = ∑ x ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• x) := by simp_rw [inter_comm]
    refine ⟨f, hFA hfF, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := hf
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• f) := by
        gcongr
        intro x hx
        rw [← mul_one x]
        exact mul_mem_mul hx hS₁

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
      by_contra h
      simp [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.1 h] at hASF
      simp [hASF] at hA₀
    have : ∑ f ∈ F, (#(A ∩ S <• f) : ℝ) ≥ #A := by
      calc (#A : ℝ) = #(A ∩ S * F) := by rw [inter_eq_left.2 hASF]
        _ = #(F.biUnion fun f ↦ A ∩ S <• f) := by
          simp only [← inter_biUnion]; congr; ext; simp
        _ ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
    obtain ⟨f, hfF, hf⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, #A / #F ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      by_contra! h
      have : ∑ f ∈ F, (#(A ∩ S <• f) : ℝ) < ∑ f ∈ F, #A / #F := sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty hF₀ h
      simp only [sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul] at this
      rw [div_mul_cancel₀ _ (cast_ne_zero.2 hF₀.ne_empty)] at this
      linarith
    refine ⟨f, hFA hfF, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := hf
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• f) := by
        gcongr
        exact subset_mul_left _ hS₁

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty :=
      nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 fun h ↦ hA₀.ne_empty <|
        subset_empty_iff.1 <| hASF.trans <| by simp [h]
    obtain ⟨a, ha, hmax⟩ := F.exists_max_image (fun x ↦ #(A ∩ S <• x)) hF₀
    refine ⟨a, hFA ha, ?_⟩
    rw [le_div_iff₀ (by positivity), mul_comm (2 * K)]
    calc
      (A.card : ℝ) ≤ ∑ x ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• x) := by
        calc (A.card : ℝ) ≤ #(⋃ x ∈ F, A ∩ S <• x) := by
               push_cast; apply card_le_card
               intro x hx
               obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF hx)
               exact mem_biUnion hf (mem_inter.2 ⟨hx, mem_smul_finset.2 ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩⟩)
             _ ≤ ∑ x ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• x) := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
      _ ≤ ∑ _ ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := sum_le_sum fun x hx ↦ mod_cast hmax x hx
      _ = #(A ∩ S <• a) * F.card := by simp [mul_comm]
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) * (2 * K) := by gcongr
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2) * (2 * K) := by
        gcongr
        intro x hx
        simp only [op_smul_eq_mul, mem_inter, mem_smul_finset] at hx ⊢
        obtain ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩ := hx
        exact ⟨s, mul_mem_mul hs hS₁, rfl⟩

have h_cover : A ⊆ ⋃ f ∈ F, S <• f := by
      intro a ha
      obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := Finset.mem_mul.mp (hASF ha)
      simp only [mem_biUnion, mem_smul_finset, MulOpposite.op_smul_eq_mul]
      exact ⟨f, hf, s, hs, rfl⟩
    have h_sum : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := calc
      (#A : ℝ) = #(⋃ f ∈ F, A ∩ S <• f) := by rw [← inter_biUnion, inter_eq_left.mpr h_cover]
      _ ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
    have hF_nonempty : F.Nonempty := by
      by_contra h
      simp [Finset.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty.mp h] at h_cover
      exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty.mp h_cover)
    obtain ⟨a, haF, ha_card⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / #F ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      by_contra! h
      have : ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) < #A := calc
        ∑ f ∈ F, (#(A ∩ S <• f) : ℝ) < ∑ f ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / #F := sum_lt_sum hF_nonempty (fun x hx ↦ h x hx)
        _ = #F * (#A / #F) := sum_const _
        _ = #A := by field_simp [hF_nonempty.ne_empty]
      linarith
    refine ⟨a, hFA haF, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := ha_card
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) := by gcongr; exact subset_pow hS₁ two_ne_zero

obtain ⟨a, ha, hcard⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      refine exists_le_of_sum_le (nonempty_of_ne_empty <| by
        rintro rfl; simp at hASF; exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty_iff.1 hASF)) ?_
      calc
        (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) * #F = (#A : ℝ) * (#F / (2 * K)) := by ring
        _ ≤ #A * 1 := by gcongr; exact div_le_one_of_le hFcard (by positivity)
        _ = #A := mul_one _
        _ ≤ #(A ∩ S * F) := by gcongr; exact hASF
        _ ≤ ∑ a in F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
          norm_cast
          calc
            #(A ∩ S * F) = #(A ∩ F.biUnion (fun a ↦ S <• a)) := by
                congr; ext; simp [mem_mul, mem_biUnion, mem_smul_finset, exists_prop]
                constructor <;> rintro ⟨u, hu, v, hv, rfl⟩ <;> exact ⟨v, hv, u, hu, rfl⟩
            _ = #(F.biUnion (fun a ↦ A ∩ S <• a)) := by rw [inter_biUnion]
            _ ≤ ∑ a in F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := card_biUnion_le
    refine ⟨a, hFA ha, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := hcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) := by
        gcongr
        exact fun x hx ↦ mem_mul.2 ⟨x, hx, 1, hS₁, mul_one _⟩

obtain ⟨a, haF, ha⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      by_contra! h
      obtain ⟨f₀, hf₀⟩ := F.eq_empty_or_nonempty.resolve_left (fun hF ↦
        hA₀.ne_empty <| subset_empty.1 <| by rwa [hF, mul_empty] at hASF)
      apply lt_irrefl (#A : ℝ)
      calc
        (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := mod_cast
          (card_le_card_of_subset_preimage (fun x hx ↦ by
            obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF hx)
            exact mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, mem_inter.2 ⟨hx, mem_op_smul_set.2 hs⟩⟩)).trans card_biUnion_le
        _ < ∑ a ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) := sum_lt_sum (fun x hx ↦ (h x hx).le) ⟨f₀, hf₀, h f₀ hf₀⟩
        _ ≤ 2 * K * (#A / (2 * K)) := by simp; gcongr; exact hFcard
        _ = #A := by field_simp [show K ≠ 0 by positivity]
    refine ⟨a, hFA haF, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := ha
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) := by gcongr; simp [hS₁]

have hF : F.Nonempty := (hA₀.mono hASF).of_mul_right
    have : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      calc (#A : ℝ)
        _ ≤ #(⋃ f ∈ F, A ∩ S <• f) := by
          gcongr; intro a ha
          obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := hASF ha
          exact mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, mem_smul_finset.2 ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩⟩
        _ ≤ _ := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
    obtain ⟨f, hf, hf'⟩ := exists_le_of_sum_le hF this
    refine ⟨f, hFA hf, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := hf'
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ MulOpposite.op f • S ^ 2) := by
        gcongr; apply inter_subset_inter_right
        apply smul_subset_smul_right; intro x hx
        exact mem_mul.2 ⟨x, hx, 1, hS₁, mul_one x⟩

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := nonempty_iff_ne_empty.2 fun h ↦
      hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty.1 (hASF.trans (by simp [h])))
    obtain ⟨f, hfF, hf⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, #A / #F ≤ (#(A ∩ S <• f) : ℝ) := by
      by_contra! h
      have : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := mod_cast
        calc #A ≤ #(F.biUnion fun f ↦ A ∩ S <• f) := card_le_of_subset fun a ha ↦ by
            rcases mem_mul.1 (hASF ha) with ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩
            exact mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, mem_inter.2 ⟨ha, mem_smul_finset.2 ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩⟩⟩
          _ ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := card_biUnion_le
      have : ∑ f ∈ F, (#(A ∩ S <• f) : ℝ) < #A :=
        (sum_lt_sum (fun i hi ↦ h i hi) hF₀).trans_eq <| by
          field_simp [hF₀.card_ne_zero]
      linarith
    refine ⟨f, hFA hfF, ?_⟩
    calc (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K)
      _ ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := hf
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• f) := by
        gcongr
        exact inter_subset_inter_right _ (smul_finset_subset_smul_finset (subset_mul_left _ hS₁))

obtain ⟨a, haF, ha⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
        obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hA₀
        obtain ⟨_, _, f, hf, _⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF hx)
        exact ⟨f, hf⟩
      by_contra! h
      have : #A ≤ ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
        refine (card_le_card_of_subset fun x hx ↦ ?_).trans card_biUnion_le
        obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF hx)
        exact mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, mem_inter.2 ⟨hx, mem_smul_finset.2 ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩⟩⟩
      refine this.not_lt (lt_of_le_of_lt ?_ (by field_simp; ring))
      calc
        ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) < ∑ a ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) := sum_lt_sum (fun a ha ↦ h a ha) hF₀
        _ = #F * (#A / (2 * K)) := by simp
        _ ≤ 2 * K * (#A / (2 * K)) := by gcongr
    exact ⟨a, hFA haF, ha.trans (by gcongr; exact subset_mul_right hS₁)⟩

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
      rw [nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; rintro rfl; simp at hASF; exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty_iff.1 hASF)
    have : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, (A ∩ S <• f).card := calc
      (#A : ℝ) = (A ∩ S * F).card := by rw [inter_eq_left.2 hASF]
      _ ≤ (F.biUnion fun f ↦ A ∩ S <• f).card := by
        gcongr; intro x hx; simp only [mem_inter, mem_mul, mem_biUnion, mem_smul_finset] at hx ⊢
        rcases hx.2 with ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩
        exact ⟨f, hf, hx.1, s, hs, rfl⟩
      _ ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, (A ∩ S <• f).card := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
    obtain ⟨f, hf, hf_ineq⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / F.card ≤ (A ∩ S <• f).card := by
      by_contra! h
      have : ∑ f ∈ F, ((A ∩ S <• f).card : ℝ) < ∑ f ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / F.card := sum_lt_sum fun f hf ↦ h f hf
      simp only [sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul] at this
      have : (F.card : ℝ) ≠ 0 := Nat.cast_ne_zero.2 hF₀.ne_empty
      rw [mul_div_cancel₀ _ this] at this
      linarith
    refine ⟨f, hFA hf, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / F.card := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ _ := hf_ineq
      _ ≤ _ := by gcongr; intro s hs; rw [← mul_one s]; exact mul_mem_mul hs hS₁

by_contra! h
    have hF₀ : F.Nonempty :=
      let ⟨_, h⟩ := hA₀; let ⟨_, _, _, hf, _⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF h); ⟨_, hf⟩
    have : ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) < (#A : ℝ) := calc
      ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) ≤ ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) :=
        sum_le_sum fun a _ ↦ mod_cast card_le_card (inter_subset_inter_right A (mul_subset_mul_right (subset_mul_left hS₁ S)))
      _ < ∑ a ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) := sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty hF₀ fun a ha ↦ h a (hFA ha)
      _ = (#F : ℝ) / (2 * K) * #A := by simp; ring
      _ ≤ 1 * #A := by gcongr; exact (div_le_one (by positivity)).mpr hFcard
      _ = #A := one_mul _
    refine this.not_le ?_
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) ≤ #(S * F ∩ A) := mod_cast card_le_card_of_subset_left hASF
      _ ≤ ∑ a ∈ F, #(S <• a ∩ A) := by rw [mul_eq_biUnion, inter_biUnion]; exact mod_cast card_biUnion_le
      _ = ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := by simp_rw [inter_comm]

obtain ⟨a, ha, h⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      by_contra! h
      have hF : F.Nonempty := by
        rw [nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; rintro rfl
        simp at hASF; exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty_iff.1 hASF)
      have : (#A : ℝ) < #A := calc
        (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
          push_cast
          refine (card_le_of_subset fun x hx ↦ ?_).trans card_biUnion_le
          obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := (mem_mul ..).1 (hASF hx)
          exact mem_biUnion hf (mem_image_of_mem _ hs)
        _ < ∑ _ ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) := sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty hF h
        _ = #F * (#A / (2 * K)) := by simp
        _ ≤ 2 * K * (#A / (2 * K)) := by gcongr
        _ = #A := by field_simp [show K ≠ 0 by linarith]
      linarith
    refine ⟨a, hFA ha, h.trans ?_⟩
    gcongr
    intro x hx
    simpa using mem_mul.2 ⟨x, hx, 1, hS₁, mul_one x⟩

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := nonempty_of_ne_empty <| by
      rintro rfl; simp at hASF; exact hA₀.ne_empty hASF
    obtain ⟨f, hf, hf'⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      by_contra! h
      have : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
        push_cast
        refine le_trans ?_ card_biUnion_le
        refine card_le_card fun a ha ↦ ?_
        obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := hASF ha
        simp only [mem_biUnion, mem_inter, mem_smul_finset, op_smul_eq_mul]
        exact ⟨f, hf, ha, s, hs, rfl⟩
      refine this.not_lt <| (sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty hF₀ h).trans_le ?_
      simp only [sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul]
      gcongr
      field_simp [show K ≠ 0 by positivity]
      ring
    refine ⟨f, hFA hf, hf'.trans ?_⟩
    gcongr
    exact fun x hx ↦ mem_mul.2 ⟨x, hx, 1, hS₁, mul_one x⟩

have hF_ne : F.Nonempty :=
      Nonempty.of_ne_empty fun h ↦ hA₀.ne_empty <| hASF.trans <| by simp [h]
    obtain ⟨a, ha, ha'⟩ := exists_le_of_sum_le hF_ne <| calc
      (A.card : ℝ) = (F.biUnion fun a ↦ A ∩ S * {a}).card := by
        rw [← inter_biUnion, ← mul_eq_biUnion_right, inter_eq_left.2 hASF]
      _ ≤ ∑ a in F, (A ∩ S * {a}).card := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
    refine ⟨a, hFA ha, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ (A ∩ S * {a}).card := ha'
      _ ≤ (A ∩ MulOpposite.op a • S ^ 2).card := by
        change _ ≤ (A ∩ S ^ 2 * {a}).card
        gcongr
        intro x hx
        exact mem_mul.2 ⟨x, hx, 1, hS₁, mul_one _⟩

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := (hA₀.mono hASF).of_mul_right
    obtain ⟨a, haF, ha⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / #F ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      refine exists_card_mul_le_of_le_sum hF₀ ?_
      rw [div_mul_cancel₀ _ (mod_cast hF₀.card_ne_zero)]
      calc
        (#A : ℝ) ≤ #(A ∩ S * F) := by gcongr; exact hASF
        _ = #(F.biUnion fun a ↦ A ∩ S <• a) := by rw [← inter_biUnion, biUnion_op_smul_eq_mul]
        _ ≤ ∑ a in F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
    refine ⟨a, hFA haF, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ (#A : ℝ) / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := ha
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) := by gcongr; exact subset_mul_left _ hS₁

obtain ⟨f, hfF, hf⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S * {f}) := by
      by_contra! h
      have : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S * {f}) := by
        calc (#A : ℝ) ≤ #(A ∩ S * F) := by gcongr; exact hASF
          _ ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S * {f}) := by
            rw [← card_biUnion_le]
            gcongr
            intro x hx
            simp only [mem_mul, mem_biUnion, mem_singleton] at hx ⊢
            rcases hx with ⟨s, hs, g, hg, rfl⟩
            exact ⟨g, hg, s, hs, rfl⟩
      have hF : F.Nonempty := by
        rw [nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; rintro rfl; simp at hASF
        exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty_iff.1 hASF)
      have : ∑ f ∈ F, (#(A ∩ S * {f}) : ℝ) < #A :=
        calc ∑ f ∈ F, (#(A ∩ S * {f}) : ℝ) < ∑ f ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) :=
            Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun i _ ↦ h i) hF
          _ = #F * (#A / (2 * K)) := by simp
          _ ≤ 2 * K * (#A / (2 * K)) := by gcongr
          _ = #A := by field_simp [hK]; ring
      linarith
    refine ⟨f, hFA hfF, ?_⟩
    calc (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S * {f}) := hf
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 * {f}) := by
        gcongr
        exact fun x hx ↦ mem_mul.2 ⟨1, hS₁, x, hx, one_mul x⟩
      _ = #(A ∩ MulOpposite.op f • S ^ 2) := by
        simp only [op_smul_eq_mul, mul_singleton]

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
      rintro rfl; simp at hASF; exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty_iff.mp hASF)
    have : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      calc (#A : ℝ) ≤ #(S * F ∩ A) := by gcongr; exact hASF
        _ = #(F.biUnion (S <• ·) ∩ A) := by
          congr; ext; simp [mem_mul, mem_biUnion, mem_smul_finset, smul_eq_mul, op_smul_eq_mul]
        _ ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(S <• f ∩ A) := by rw [inter_biUnion]; exact mod_cast card_biUnion_le
        _ = ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := by congrm ∑ _ ∈ _, _; exact inter_comm _ _
    obtain ⟨f, hfF, hf⟩ := exists_le_of_sum_le hF₀ (fun f ↦ (#(A ∩ S <• f) : ℝ))
    refine ⟨f, hFA hfF, ?_⟩
    rw [mul_comm] at hf
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ (#A : ℝ) / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := (div_le_iff₀' (by mod_cast hF₀.card_pos)).mpr hf
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• f) := by
        gcongr; rw [pow_two]
        exact smul_set_mono (subset_mul_right _ hS₁)

rcases hx with ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩
        refine ⟨s, ?_, rfl⟩
        rw [pow_two]; exact mul_mem_mul hs hS₁

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
      rintro rfl
      simp at hASF
      exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty_iff.1 hASF)
    obtain ⟨a, ha, haS⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, #A / #F ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      refine exists_le_of_sum_le hF₀ ?_
      calc
        (#A : ℝ) ≤ #(A ∩ S * F) := by rw [inter_eq_self_of_subset_left hASF]
        _ = #(F.biUnion fun x ↦ A ∩ S <• x) := by congr; ext; simp
        _ ≤ ∑ x ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• x) := by rw [inter_biUnion]; exact mod_cast card_biUnion_le
    refine ⟨a, hFA ha, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := haS
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) := by gcongr; exact subset_mul_left S hS₁

have : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      rw [← cast_sum]
      refine mod_cast card_le_sum_card_biUnion ?_
      rw [← inter_biUnion]
      refine subset_inter_iff.2 ⟨rfl.subset, ?_⟩
      rwa [mul_eq_biUnion] at hASF
    obtain ⟨f, hfF, hf⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      by_contra! h
      have hFne : F.Nonempty := by
        rcases F.eq_empty_or_nonempty with rfl | h; · simp at this; linarith [hA₀.card_pos]; · exact h
      have : ∑ f ∈ F, (#(A ∩ S <• f) : ℝ) < #A :=
        calc ∑ f ∈ F, (#(A ∩ S <• f) : ℝ)
          _ < ∑ f ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) := sum_lt_sum hFne h
          _ = #F * (#A / (2 * K)) := by simp
          _ ≤ 2 * K * (#A / (2 * K)) := by gcongr
          _ = #A := by field_simp [show K ≠ 0 by linarith]
      linarith
    refine ⟨f, hFA hfF, ?_⟩
    calc #A / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := hf
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• f) := by
        gcongr
        exact pow_subset_pow_of_one_mem hS₁ one_le_two

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
      rw [nonempty_iff_ne_empty]; rintro rfl
      simp at hASF; exact hA₀.ne_empty (subset_empty.mp hASF)
    have h_sum : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := calc
      (#A : ℝ) ≤ #(A ∩ S * F) := by gcongr; exact hASF
      _ = #(⋃ a ∈ F, A ∩ S <• a) := by rw [← inter_biUnion, ← mul_eq_biUnion]
      _ ≤ ∑ a ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• a) := mod_cast card_biUnion_le
    obtain ⟨a, ha, ha_card⟩ : ∃ a ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / #F ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := by
      by_contra! h
      have : ∑ a ∈ F, (#(A ∩ S <• a) : ℝ) < ∑ a ∈ F, (#A / #F : ℝ) :=
        sum_lt_sum (fun x hx ↦ h x hx) hF₀
      simp only [sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul] at this
      rw [mul_div_cancel₀ _ (mod_cast hF₀.ne_empty)] at this
      exact this.not_le h_sum
    refine ⟨a, hFA ha, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• a) := ha_card
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• a) := by
        gcongr; exact mul_subset_mul_right (subset_mul_left _ hS₁)

obtain ⟨f, hfF, hf⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S * {f}) := by
      by_contra! h
      apply lt_irrefl (#A : ℝ)
      calc
        (#A : ℝ) ≤ #(S * F ∩ A) := mod_cast card_le_of_subset (subset_inter hASF subset_rfl)
        _ = #(F.biUnion (fun i ↦ S * {i}) ∩ A) := by rw [← mul_eq_biUnion]
        _ ≤ ∑ x ∈ F, #(S * {x} ∩ A) := by rw [inter_biUnion]; exact mod_cast card_biUnion_le
        _ = ∑ x ∈ F, #(A ∩ S * {x}) := by simp_rw [inter_comm]
        _ < ∑ _ ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) := sum_lt_sum (fun i hi ↦ h i hi) <|
          F.eq_empty_or_nonempty.resolve_left fun hF ↦
            hA₀.ne_empty <| subset_empty.mp <| hASF.trans <| by simp [hF]
        _ ≤ 2 * K * (#A / (2 * K)) := by simp; gcongr; exact hFcard
        _ = #A := mul_div_cancel₀ _ (by positivity)
    refine ⟨f, hFA hfF, hf.trans ?_⟩
    gcongr
    exact subset_mul_left _ hS₁

obtain ⟨f, hfF, hf⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      by_contra! h
      have hF : F.Nonempty := by
        obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hA₀
        obtain ⟨s, -, f, hf, -⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF ha)
        exact ⟨f, hf⟩
      apply lt_irrefl (#A : ℝ)
      calc (#A : ℝ)
        _ ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
          rw [← cast_sum]
          refine mod_cast (card_le_of_subset ?_).trans card_biUnion_le
          intro a ha
          obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF ha)
          refine mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, mem_inter_of_mem ha ?_⟩
          exact mem_smul_finset.2 ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩
        _ < ∑ _ ∈ F, #A / (2 * K) := sum_lt_sum (fun f hf ↦ h f hf) hF
        _ = #F * (#A / (2 * K)) := sum_const _
        _ ≤ 2 * K * (#A / (2 * K)) := by gcongr; exact hFcard
        _ = #A := by field_simp [show K ≠ 0 by linarith]
    refine ⟨f, hFA hfF, ?_⟩
    apply hf.trans
    gcongr
    intro x hx
    simp only [sq]
    exact mem_mul.2 ⟨x, hx, 1, hS₁, mul_one x⟩

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
      rw [nonempty_iff_ne_empty]
      rintro rfl
      simp at hASF
      exact hA₀.ne_empty hASF
    obtain ⟨f, hfF, hf⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / #F ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      have : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f in F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := mod_cast calc
        #A ≤ #(F.biUnion fun f ↦ A ∩ S <• f) := by
          rw [← biUnion_inter, inter_eq_left.2]
          rintro a ha
          obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := mem_mul.1 (hASF ha)
          exact mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, mem_smul_finset.2 ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩⟩
        _ ≤ ∑ f in F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := card_biUnion_le
      contrapose! this
      calc
        ∑ f in F, (#(A ∩ S <• f) : ℝ) < ∑ f in F, (#A : ℝ) / #F := sum_lt_sum hF₀ this
        _ = #A := by field_simp [hF₀.ne_empty]
    refine ⟨f, hFA hfF, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := hf
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• f) := by
        gcongr
        exact fun x hx ↦ mem_mul.2 ⟨x, hx, 1, hS₁, mul_one x⟩

have hF₀ : F.Nonempty := by
      obtain ⟨a, ha⟩ := hA₀
      obtain ⟨_, _, _, hf, _⟩ := Finset.mem_mul.1 (hASF ha)
      exact ⟨_, hf⟩
    have hsum : (#A : ℝ) ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      calc (#A : ℝ) ≤ #(F.biUnion (fun f ↦ A ∩ S <• f)) := by
             gcongr
             intro a ha
             obtain ⟨s, hs, f, hf, rfl⟩ := Finset.mem_mul.1 (hASF ha)
             exact Finset.mem_biUnion.2 ⟨f, hf, Finset.mem_inter.2 ⟨ha, Finset.mem_smul_finset.2 ⟨s, hs, rfl⟩⟩⟩
        _ ≤ ∑ f ∈ F, #(A ∩ S <• f) := mod_cast Finset.card_biUnion_le
    obtain ⟨f, hf, hf_bound⟩ : ∃ f ∈ F, (#A : ℝ) / #F ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := by
      by_contra! h
      have : ∑ f ∈ F, (#(A ∩ S <• f) : ℝ) < ∑ f ∈ F, (#A / #F) := Finset.sum_lt_sum_of_nonempty hF₀ h
      simp only [Finset.sum_const, nsmul_eq_mul] at this
      rw [mul_div_cancel₀ _ (mod_cast hF₀.card_ne_zero)] at this
      linarith
    refine ⟨f, hFA hf, ?_⟩
    calc
      (#A : ℝ) / (2 * K) ≤ #A / #F := by gcongr; exact hFcard
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S <• f) := hf_bound
      _ ≤ #(A ∩ S ^ 2 <• f) := by
        gcongr
        intro s hs
        simpa using Finset.mul_mem_mul hs hS₁
